misc.text: ¡Por fin podemos anunciar que publicaremos las novelas de 𝐋𝐎𝐒 𝐃𝐈𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 𝐃𝐄 𝐋𝐀 𝐁𝐎𝐓𝐈𝐂𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐀 de Hyuganatsu! 🌿 ➡️ Las novelas del fenómeno juvenil internacional con 45 millones de ejemplares vendidos llegan por fin a España.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Imu didn't call Ace and Sabo by name. He just mentioned them as Luffy's brothers. Dunno about "idiot" but Imu definitely called them "not very well-mannered" WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ON
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Imu didn't call Ace and Sabo by name. He just mentioned them as Luffy's brothers. Dunno about "idiot" but Imu definitely called them "not very well-mannered" WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1189 When Luffy is completely overwhelmed by Imu in this chapter, Imu also begins to mock him mentally; he targets Ace (mocking his death) and Sabo, and remarks that all three brothers are idiots. — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2080325631808516186#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Oden did this to Kaido, made him almost losing the battle.. People shouldn't underestimate Gaban... Dengekivinsmoke 🇲🇦 (@dengekivinsmoke) #ONEPIECE1189 The powerscaling logic is hilari
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Oden did this to Kaido, made him almost losing the battle.. People shouldn't underestimate Gaban... Dengekivinsmoke 🇲🇦 (@dengekivinsmoke) #ONEPIECE1189 The powerscaling logic is hilarious 🤡💀 ▫️Base Luffy boxing Kaido: Believable. ▫️Yamato boxing Kaido: Believable. ▫️Prime Gaban boxing Kaido: Impossible What is stopping PRIME Gaban from carving Kaido wide open with his ACoC-infused axes like Oden did ? 😭 — https://nitter.net/dengekivinsmoke/status/2080359056036786650#m

misc.title: [#ONEPIECE1189] Oda could be trying to indicate something with this! Imu mentioning of Luffy brother Sabo & Ace, yes he mocking them but also it could be Imu thinking about his possible brother like r
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE1189] Oda could be trying to indicate something with this! Imu mentioning of Luffy brother Sabo & Ace, yes he mocking them but also it could be Imu thinking about his possible brother like relationship. Him,Davy Jones & Joyboy!! WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1189 When Luffy is completely overwhelmed by Imu in this chapter, Imu also begins to mock him mentally; he targets Ace (mocking his death) and Sabo, and remarks that all three brothers are idiots. — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2080325631808516186#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Perhaps they are the two swords that slayed Joyboy and Nika!🔅👀 Merlin D. Wizard 🐸🔮 (@merlinidc) #ONEPIECE1189 Luffy is impaled to Yggdrasil with two swords. Blade of Nothingness, Voh
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Perhaps they are the two swords that slayed Joyboy and Nika!🔅👀 Merlin D. Wizard 🐸🔮 (@merlinidc) #ONEPIECE1189 Luffy is impaled to Yggdrasil with two swords. Blade of Nothingness, Vohu and Sword of the Sea God Could these have been the two weapons that felled Joyboy and Nika? Odin of Norse Mythology pins himself to Yggdrasil, and learns the secrets of Magic Runes! — https://nitter.net/merlinidc/status/2080119568907841699#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Vohu (Emptiness) and Tohu (Chaos) are based on the line from Genesis describing the world before the creation of light. Yoru (Night) could represent the darkness that existed before ligh
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Vohu (Emptiness) and Tohu (Chaos) are based on the line from Genesis describing the world before the creation of light. Yoru (Night) could represent the darkness that existed before light was created. These three swords may symbolize the world before the Sun 🤯

misc.title: Ruthless Luffy has one job this arc : sending Imu flying even if he doesn't get beaten The payback in the final war will be crazy #ONEPIECE1189 WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1189 When Luffy is com
misc.text: Ruthless Luffy has one job this arc : sending Imu flying even if he doesn't get beaten The payback in the final war will be crazy #ONEPIECE1189 WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1189 When Luffy is completely overwhelmed by Imu in this chapter, Imu also begins to mock him mentally; he targets Ace (mocking his death) and Sabo, and remarks that all three brothers are idiots. — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2080325631808516186#m

misc.title: TV Anime "BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity -" (Cour 4) is listed for ONLY 10 EPISODES in total ! The ‘Final Part’, directed by Hikaru Murata at Studio PIERROT FILMS, is scheduled to prem
misc.text: TV Anime "BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity -" (Cour 4) is listed for ONLY 10 EPISODES in total ! The ‘Final Part’, directed by Hikaru Murata at Studio PIERROT FILMS, is scheduled to premiere July 25.
